title: The Salvage Monkeys Arrive
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on toward the knock up stream. The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
scene: This scene belongs to the Toward the Knock Up Stream sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It must have been coated with tar.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Right... But the ship is already sinki-

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What the hell are you two doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nami... Please treat the ship with care.

summary: The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
